@props(['code', 'highlightedLine']) <div class="text-sm rounded-b-lg bg-neutral-50 border-t border-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-900 dark:border-white/10" {{ $attributes }} > <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::syntax-highlight :code="$code" language="php" editor :starting-line="max(1, $highlightedLine - 5)" :highlighted-line="min(5, $highlightedLine - 1)" class="overflow-x-auto" /> </div>
